sqlMap.select: SELECT taskid, creatorid, case when #primary# = 1 then creatorname else creatorName2 end as creatorname, case when #primary# = 1 then creatordeptname else creatordeptname2 end as creatordeptname, creatoremail, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(createdate,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) as createDate, taskstatus, completerate, importance, hasshare, hasattach, hascomment, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(startdate,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) as startdate, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(enddate,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) as enddate, title, contentpath, tasktype, updatetime, personid, personname, case when #primary# = 1 then personname else personname2 end as personname, case when #primary# = 1 then persondeptname else persondeptname2 end as persondeptname, personemail, personattach, personcontentpath, memo FROM TBL_TASK WHERE tenantid = #tenantID# AND taskid = #taskID#

SELECT taskID, commentid, commentorid, case when #primary# = 1 then commentorname else commentorname2 end as commentorname, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(commentdate,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) as commentdate, comment FROM TBL_TASKCOMMENT WHERE tenantid = #tenantID# AND taskid = #taskID#

SELECT sharerid, case when #primary# = 1 then sharername else sharername2 end as sharername, sharername as sharername1, sharername2, case when #primary# = 1 then sharerdeptname else sharerdeptname2 end as sharerdeptname, sharerdeptname2, B.mail as email FROM TBL_TASKSHARE A JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON A.tenantid = B.tenant_id AND A.sharerid = B.cn WHERE tenantid = #tenantID# AND taskid = #taskID#
SELECT taskid, attachid, filename, filepath, filesize FROM TBL_TASKATTACH WHERE tenantid = #tenantID# AND taskid = #taskID# AND type = #type#
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO TBL_TASK (parentid, ownerid, creatorid, creatorname, creatorname2, createdate, taskstatus, completerate, completedate, importance, hasshare, hasattach, startdate, enddate, title, contentpath, tasktype, updatetime, personid, personname, personname2, persondeptname, persondeptname2, taskpersonid, taskpersonname, taskpersonname2, memo, tenantid) VALUES
(0, #ownerID#, #creatorID#, #creatorName#, #creatorName2#, #nowDate#, #taskStatus#, 0, '', #importance#, #hasShare#, #hasAttach#, #startDate#, #endDate#, #title#, #contentPath#, #taskType#, #nowDate#, #personID#, #personName#, #personName2#, #personDeptName#, #personDeptName2#, #personID#, #personName#, #personName2#, #memo#, #tenantID#)
(#parentID#, #sharerID#, #creatorID#, #creatorName#, #creatorName2#, #nowDate#, #taskStatus#, 0, '', #importance#, #hasShare#, #hasAttach#, #startDate#, #endDate#, #title#, #contentPath#, #taskType#, #nowDate#, #sharerID#, #sharerName#, #sharerName2#, #sharerDeptName#, #sharerDeptName2#, #personID#, #personName#, #personName2#, #memo#, #tenantID#)
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()

INSERT INTO TBL_TASKSHARE (taskid, sharerid, sharername, sharername2, sharerdeptname, sharerdeptname2, updatetime, neworder, tenantid) VALUES (#taskID#, #sharerID#, #sharerName#, #sharerName2#, #sharerDeptName#, #sharerDeptName2#, #nowDate#, 'Y', #tenantID#)
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_TASK SET importance = #importance#, hasshare = #hasShare#, hasattach = #hasAttach#, startdate = #startDate#, enddate = #endDate#, title = #title#, tasktype = #taskType#, updatetime = #nowDate#, personid = #personID#, personname = #personName#, personname2 = #personName2#, persondeptname = #personDeptName#, persondeptname2 = #personDeptName2#, taskpersonid = #personID#, taskpersonname = #personName#, taskpersonname2 = #personName2#, memo = #memo# WHERE tenantID = #tenantID# AND taskID = #taskID#

update.isEqual: UPDATE TBL_TASK SET hascomment=#hasComment# WHERE tenantID = #tenantID# AND taskid = #taskID#
UPDATE TBL_TASK SET hascomment=#hasComment# WHERE tenantID = #tenantID# AND taskid = #taskID# AND 0 = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_TASKCOMMENT WHERE tenantid = #tenantID# AND taskid = #taskID# )

sqlMap.update: INSERT INTO TBL_TASKCOMMENT (taskid, commentorid, commentorname, commentorname2, commentdate, comment, tenantID) VALUES (#taskID#, #commentorID#, #commentorName#, #commentorName2#, #nowDate#, #comment#, #tenantID#)
UPDATE TBL_TASK SET taskstatus = #taskStatus#, completerate = #completeRate# WHERE tenantid = #tenantID# AND taskid = #taskID#
UPDATE TBL_TASK SET personattach = #personAttach#, personcontentpath = #personContentPath# WHERE tenantid = #tenantID# AND taskid = #taskID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_TASKCOMMENT WHERE tenantid = #tenantID# AND taskid = #taskID# AND commentid = #commentID#
DELETE FROM TBL_TASKATTACH WHERE tenantid = #tenantID# AND taskid = #taskID# AND type = #attachType#
sqlMap.select: SELECT IFNULL((SELECT delaycolor FROM TBL_TASKCONFIG WHERE tenantid = #tenantID# AND userid = #userID#), '##FF0000') as delaycolor, IFNULL((SELECT completecolor FROM TBL_TASKCONFIG WHERE tenantid = #tenantID# AND userid = #userID#), '##0080FF') as completecolor, userid FROM TBL_TASKCONFIG WHERE userid = #userID# AND tenantid = #tenantID#

SELECT A.taskid, creatorid, creatorname, creatorname2, creatordeptname, creatordeptname2, creatoremail, importance, hasattach, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(startdate,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) as startDate, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(enddate,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) as endDate, title, tasktype, taskstatus, completerate, personid, personname, personname2, persondeptname, persondeptname2, personemail, hascomment, memo FROM TBL_TASK A LEFT JOIN TBL_TASKSHARE B ON A.tenantid = B.tenantid AND A.taskid = B.taskid WHERE A.tenantid = #tenantID#
taskstatus != 3
taskstatus = 3
AND (personid = #userID# OR B.sharerid = #userID#) AND tasktype = 1
taskstatus != 3
taskstatus = 3
AND (creatorid = #userID#) AND tasktype != 1
title LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #filter#), '%')
personname LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #filter#), '%')
taskstatus = 1
taskstatus = 2
taskstatus = 3
taskstatus = 4
( (startdate >= #startDate# and startdate <= #endDate#) or (enddate >= #startDate# and enddate < #endDate#) or (startdate < #startDate# and enddate >= #endDate#) ) AND (personid = #userID#)
ORDER BY startdate DESC, taskid DESC

SELECT COUNT(A.taskID) FROM TBL_TASK A JOIN TBL_TASKSHARE B ON A.tenantid = B.tenantid AND A.taskid = B.taskid WHERE A.tenantid = #tenantID#
taskstatus != 3
taskstatus = 3
AND (personid = #userID# OR B.sharerid = #userID#) AND tasktype = 1
AND title LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #filter#), '%')
AND taskpersonname LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #filter#), '%')

SELECT COUNT(A.taskID) FROM TBL_TASK A JOIN TBL_TASKSHARE B ON A.tenantid = B.tenantid AND A.taskid = B.taskid WHERE A.tenantid = #tenantID#
taskstatus != 3
taskstatus = 3
AND (creatorid = #userID#) AND tasktype != 1
AND title LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #filter#), '%')
AND taskpersonname LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #filter#), '%')
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_TASKCONFIG (userid, delaycolor, completecolor, autodelete, tenantid) VALUES (#memberID#, #delayColor#, #completeColor#, #autoDelete#, #tenantID#)
INSERT INTO TBL_TASKATTACH (taskid, filesize, filename, filepath, type, tenantid) VALUES (#taskID#, #fileSize#, #fileName#, #filePath#, #taskType#, #tenantID#)
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_TASKCONFIG SET delaycolor = #delayColor#, completecolor = #completeColor#, autodelete = #autoDelete# WHERE userid = #memberID# AND tenantid = #tenantID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_TASK WHERE tenantid = #tenantID# AND taskid = #taskID#
DELETE FROM TBL_TASKSHARE WHERE taskid = #taskID# AND tenantid = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_TASKATTACH WHERE taskid = #taskID# AND tenantid = #tenantID#
